name: Dev.to
description: Dev.to — Open-source developer blogging and community platform with tags, comments, and API access.

seo.title: Dev.to — Customer Support SDK / In-app Helpdesk
seo.meta_description: Dev.to: Dev.to — Open-source developer blogging and community platform with tags, comments, and API access.

when_to_use: Developer relations content published to reach dev audience
Company engineering blog cross-posted via Dev.to API
Open-source project announcements with community discussion
Recruiting engineers by building brand through technical posts
API integration for syndicating internal blog to Dev.to feed

pros: Free to publish with canonical URL support
cons: SEO juice per post diluted by volume
review.verdict: A solid cross-posting channel for reach, not a place to build your primary brand or audience.
review.best_for: Developers cross-posting articles with canonical tags to reach extra readers.
review.not_for: Writers seeking quality curation or direct monetization from readers.
